text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
My first three years with T.M. Opera O<n>were
dramatic, to say the least, but<n>they have now
come to a close.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's a decent record coupled with a<n>lasting impact.
But the Centurial<n>Overlord is not about to go quiet.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Alas! How many times must our<n>views clash?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah! But now it makes sense. Now<n>that I have
become the Centurial<n>Overlord...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My life will become eternal. It's this<n>grand design
which they couldn't<n>hope to comprehend.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yes! Lend me your ears, Trainer!<n>In honor of
my achievements...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: A special race is to be held in my<n>name.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
They are calling it the T.M. Opera O
Commemoration Race!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Isn't the name absolutely ingenious?<n>With me as
its theme, can't you hear<n>the underlying melody?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The name sounds a little on the nose<n>if you ask
me, but it's a real honor<n>either way.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However! The URA and I cannot come<n>to an
agreement as to what the race<n>should entail.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Unlike you, they do not comprehend<n>the essence
of my greatness. It's<n>been made evident by their
proposals.
choice_data_list: What kind of ideas do they have?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ones that are plain, ordinary, and dull.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I give a one-hour performance leading<n>up to the
race and the victor receives<n>a life-size trophy of
myself obligatorily<n>via mail.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: That is all they were willing toconcede. How could such anunderdeveloped event be called a commemoration for me?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like they gave a lot of<n>ground to her...
But it apparently isn't<n>enough.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am the Centurial Overlord. It only<n>makes sense
that they bend to my<n>every whim.
choice_data_list: Well, what kind of race do you want?
Well, what kind of race do you want?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, a wonderful question...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It would take place at the newly<n>constructed T.M.
Opera O Racecourse!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Organized by me, hosted by me,<n>attended by me,
and run by... me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am the victor! I am the loser! And I<n>am the
presenter!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A flawless race colored in my brilliant<n>hue from
start to finish!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now that is an event worthy of thename T.M. Opera O CommemorativeRace! Haaah ha ha!
choice_data_list: What you described isn't really a race though.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Mngh! Hm, now that you mention it,<n>that may be a
fair point...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But we ought not to fuss over the<n>specifics. This
will do so long as I am<n>beautiful, with the Centurial
Overlord's authority thoroughly<n>apparent.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I will make one more attempt to<n>negotiate.
Accompany me, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Show me what the Centurial Trainer<n>can do at the
table.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm dragged away, like a cat taken by<n>its scruff.
She's as reckless and<n>demanding as ever.
Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Lofty laughter echoes across the<n>negotiating table.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O not only stirs the pot—her<n>antics keep
everyone well<n>entertained.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
That's right. This is her stage, where<n>the laughter
and surprises never end.
